description: Service hosts shared sessions initialized by a 'host' user
The 'host' user invites 'guest' users to join.
The 'host' has data that is only visible to the 'host'.
Each 'guest' has data that is only visible to that 'guest' and the 'host'.
There is 'common' data that is visible to all.
Data is **not** persisted beyond the lifecycle of the session.
Updates to each particular session are queued and processed sequentially to avoid race conditions.
Sessions should be automatically closed after a configurable timeout of inactivity, defined as no updates and no retrievals of session data.

pathParams.sessionId: guid id of an existing session

body.initialData: optional json of initial guest data

endpoints.description: endpoint for a guest with the session id to join the session, returns new guest id

pathParams.sessionId: guid id of an existing session
pathParams.hostId: guid id of the host of the session, used to verify access

200.lastModifiedOn: datetime when session was last modified

endpoints.description: get all data from session for host

pathParams.sessionId: guid id of an existing session
pathParams.hostId: guid id of the host of the session, used to verify access
pathParams.guestId: guid id of the guest to be removed from the session

endpoints.description: remove a single guest from the session

pathParams.sessionId: guid id of an existing session
pathParams.hostId: guid id of the host of the session, used to verify access

200.lastModifiedOn: datetime when session was last modified

endpoints.description: remove a single guest from the session

pathParams.sessionId: guid id of an existing session
pathParams.hostId: guid id of the host of the session, used to verify access

body.hostData: optional data json as string - to be validated against hostSchema if provided on session creation
body.commonData: optional data json as string - to be validated against commonSchema if provided on session creation

guests.guestId: guid of guest used to id guest for update
guests.guestData: optional data json as string - to be validated against guestSchema if provided on session creation

200.dateQueued: datetime when the update was queued

endpoints.description: host updates any data accessible by host

pathParams.sessionId: guid id of an existing session
pathParams.guestId: guid id of a guest of the session

200.guestData: data json for the specific guest as string

endpoints.description: get data accessible for a single guest

pathParams.sessionId: guid id of an existing session
pathParams.guestId: guid id of a guest of the session

body.commonData: optional data json as string - to be validated against commonSchema if provided on session creation
body.guestData: optional data json for the specific guest as string - to be validated against guestSchema if provided on session creation

200.dateQueued: datetime when the update was queued

endpoints.description: guest updates any data accessible by guest

pathParams.sessionId: guid id of an existing session
pathParams.guestId: guid id of a guest of the session
